nasb.text: Having arrested Him, they led Him away and brought Him to the house of the high priest; but Peter was following at a distance.

esv.text: Then they seized him and led him away, bringing him into the high priest’s house, and Peter was following at a distance.

cnv.text: 他們拿住耶穌，押到大祭司家裡，彼得遠遠地跟著。

ccb.text: 他们把耶稣押到大祭司的府第。彼得远远地跟在后面。

csbs.text: 他们抓住耶稣，把他带走，押到大祭司的家里。彼得远远地跟着。
